mapper.sql: fa.id, fa.application_case_id, users.id AS user_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.status AS application_status, ac.is_favorite, fa.fit_score, fa.matched_skills, fa.missing_skills, fa.recommended_study, fa.recommended_certificates, fa.strategy, fa.source_snapshot, fa.score_basis, fa.gap_recommendations, fa.certificate_recommendations, fa.strategy_actions, fa.condition_matrix, fa.analysis_confidence, fa.apply_decision, fa.model, fa.prompt_version, fa.status, fa.error_message, fa.created_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo_count_source WHERE memo_count_source.fit_analysis_id = fa.id ) AS memo_count, ( SELECT MAX(latest_memo.updated_at) FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo latest_memo WHERE latest_memo.fit_analysis_id = fa.id ) AS latest_memo_at, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo reanalysis_memo WHERE reanalysis_memo.fit_analysis_id = fa.id AND reanalysis_memo.memo_type = 'REANALYSIS' ) AS reanalysis_requested
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id ORDER BY fa.created_at DESC, fa.id DESC

SELECT
FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE fa.id = #{id}

SELECT memo.id, memo.fit_analysis_id, memo.admin_user_id, users.name AS admin_name, users.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo INNER JOIN users ON users.id = memo.admin_user_id WHERE memo.fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} ORDER BY memo.updated_at DESC, memo.id DESC

SELECT memo.id, memo.fit_analysis_id, memo.admin_user_id, users.name AS admin_name, users.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_fit_analysis_memo memo INNER JOIN users ON users.id = memo.admin_user_id WHERE memo.id = #{id} AND memo.fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_fit_analysis_memo (fit_analysis_id, admin_user_id, memo_type, content) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{adminUserId}, #{memoType}, #{content})
